grant_title: Pennsylvania Fresh Food Financing Initiative (PA FFFI)
project_area: Increasing access to healthy, affordable food and improving economic opportunities for low- to moderate-income residents through grants and loans for grocery outlets
demographic_requirements: Low- to moderate-income residents of Pennsylvania
eligibility_summary: Businesses must meet basic eligibility criteria to qualify for funding, with most projects eligible for up to $50,000 and high-impact projects eligible for up to $150,000. Administered by The Food Trust in partnership with Pennsylvania-based CDFIs.
